nodes.label: Digital Madhesh Conclave 2025 Chief Guest Speech Event Photo
nodes.description: Wide-angle photo of the Digital Madhesh Conclave 2025 event. A speaker (Hon. Satish Kumar Singh, Chief Minister, Madhesh Province) delivers Chief Guest Remarks at a podium on the left. Behind him is a large LED screen displaying the slide 'Empowering Digital Madhesh: Fostering Digitalization and Development.' The audience fills a large banquet-style hall with chairs. Media personnel and videographers are visible in the middle of the hall. The event banner reads 'Fostering Digital Madhesh.'
